name: General Science
note: Requires a minimum cumulative 2.0 GPA in all courses counted toward the major. Students choosing a collateral major in the natural sciences or Neuroscience may not select the major in General Science. Students earning more than one major in the natural sciences or a major and a minor in the natural sciences are not eligible.

sections.label: Primary Science Area (6 courses)
sections.description: Six course credits in one of the four natural science areas (biology, chemistry, mathematics, physics).

sections.label: Secondary Science Area (5 courses)
sections.description: Five course credits in a second natural science field (or mathematics through Linear Algebra MTH-265).

sections.label: Third Science Area (2 courses)
sections.description: Two course credits in a third natural science field. At least seven of the 13 total course credits must be above the introductory level and at least two must be in biology.
